summary: Testing of QR->Phone Search replacement for field agent identification. All 32 backend API tests passed (100% - 17 agent search + 15 agent sync). Web frontend mobile-responsive at 375px viewport verified: login flow, Agent Terrain dashboard with sync bar, phone search, farmer result card, and full details view all working. React Native mobile code reviewed - correctly replaces QR scanner with FarmerSearchScreen for phone-based identification.
critical_code_review_comments: FarmerSearchScreen.js: Correctly implements phone search with offline-first fallback to cached zone farmers
FieldAgentDashboard.js: Fourth stat card correctly changed from QR icon to phone icon ('call') with label 'Recherches' and navigates to 'FarmerSearch'
BottomTabBar.js: QUICK_ACTIONS for cooperative correctly includes FarmerSearch with icon 'search' and label 'Recherche Planteur' at line 54
SSRTEAgentDashboard.js: Quick action 'Chercher Planteur' correctly navigates to 'FarmerSearch' screen
App.js: FarmerSearchScreen correctly registered at line 171 as 'FarmerSearch' route
index.js: FarmerSearchScreen correctly exported from field-agent screens module
Web AgentTerrainDashboard.jsx: Mobile-responsive with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements

success_rate.backend: 100% (32/32 tests passed - 17 agent search + 15 agent sync)

context_for_next_testing_agent: QR code replacement with phone search fully verified. Mobile React Native code (cannot be run in this environment) reviewed and found correct. Web frontend tested at 375px mobile viewport - all features working: login, agent terrain dashboard, sync bar with cache count, phone search returning farmer results (Kouassi Yao Jean with 2 parcels), and full farmer details view. Backend APIs verified: GET /api/agent/search?phone=0701111111 returns Kouadio Yao, GET /api/agent/search?phone=0701234567 returns Kouassi Yao Jean with 2 parcels, GET /api/agent/sync/download returns 8 farmers, POST /api/agent/sync/upload handles actions correctly.
